column4: What It Does
Runs the agent's reasoning + tool-use loop for every user message.
column11: Target model: gemini-2.5-pro (quality) or gemini-2.5-flash (cheap/fast). Replaces Anthropic — API key in .env as GEMINI_API_KEY.

column4: Looks up an employee by email to confirm they exist before issuing a session token.
column11: Called first during login. 404/null → 'No employee found'.

column4: Gets the employee's role and Active/Inactive status so the session can enforce permissions later.
column11: Stamps role into the server-side session — no further role API calls needed per chat turn.

column4: Returns every employee — used to resolve a name → email.
Returns a single employee record including the Mongo _id (needed for task creation).
Returns role / status / permissions for an email (agent-triggered lookup).
column11: Largely redundant post-login — role already lives in the session.

column4: Returns every task created today (org-wide).
Lists tasks assigned to a specific email.
Filters tasks by createdAt (YYYY-MM-DD).
Creates a new task. assignedBy + assignedTo must be Mongo _ids.
column11: WRITE action — role gate enforced from session (Manager / Admin / DepartmentHead).

column4: Returns projects an employee is associated with.
Returns the full equipment catalog.
column11: Limit intentionally huge to fetch everything in one call.

column4: Primary PTO lookup — returns all PTO for one email.
Single PTO record by _id.
All PTO overlapping a date window (last resort — prefer by-email).
Submits a new PTO request.
column11: WRITE action — submitter email is taken from the session automatically.

column4: Flips a PTO to approved or rejected with a comment.
column11: WRITE action — Manager / Admin / DepartmentHead only.

column4: Returns timecard records for an employee (by weekEnding or date range).
Marks a timecard as verified by a manager.
column11: WRITE action — Manager / Admin / DepartmentHead only.

column4: Creates a new incident report.
column11: WRITE action — completedByEmail is the logged-in user.

column4: Past incident reports filed / involving / witnessed by the email.
Schedule for the employee's team(s).
All on-call rotations — optional year + month filter.
Rotations overlapping a date range (both dates required).
All active checklist / form templates.
Single form template by _id.
Filters permit rules by municipality / type (all filters optional).
Issues a bearer token after validating email + password.
column11: Calls MonkeyMan employee + role APIs internally. Shared password: LOGIN_PASSWORD in .env.

column4: Returns the current session so the UI can restore state on reload.
Invalidates the bearer token server-side.
Main chat entry point — routes user input through the Gemini tool-use loop.
Wipes the conversation history for a sessionId (New Chat button).
Liveness probe for uptime monitors.
column11: Returns { ok, model, devMode }. Update model string to Gemini on swap.
